title: Pillager To Pirate
description: Replaces all illager types with different variants of pirates and introduces an immersive vanilla-like set of 3D flintlock firearms, complete with custom-made sounds.
body:
ave you ever wanted to defend your village from hordes of pirates using a flintlock pistol instead of a boring crossbow? No? Well.. I have done it anyway.  

 

The aim of this pack is to replace every component of a raid with a pirate themed counterpart and we are slowly getting to it. 

This pack will get several new updates in the future, including new weapons, enemies and even a cutom-made datapack!


MUSKET & BLUNDERBUSS:
In order to obtain these weapons all you have to do in give yourself a crossbow with a CMD value of "1".

Musket:               /give @p minecraft:crossbow{CustomModelData:2}

Blunderbuss:       /give @p minecraft:crossbow{CustomModelData:3}


TERMS OF USE:
You are mostly free to use this resourcepack and the content in it as you please, this includes modpacks and other resourcepacks provided you list the proper credits on whatever the final product may be.
The only requirement for the use of my assets as part of a separate project is my permission to do so (feel free to DM me at any time), and I will usually request you to put a link to this pack somewhere in the download page of whatever product they might be used for.
This is made to ensure that the pack's content isn't distributed in ways that would bring harm to some other personal projects of mine.
